data.title: ANPABO Licensed Ford F-150 24V 2 Seater Ride on Car for Kids, 4x100W Motors for All-Terrain Electric Car with Parental Remote

features: 【Official License & Immersive Retro Adventure】This kids' electric car perfectly recreates the classic styling and retro colors of the 1973 Ford F-150. Complete with bright LED headlights
realistic engine sounds
a functional steering wheel
and a music panel with Bluetooth & FM radio
it immerses young drivers in a realistic experience. Every detail is designed for immersive pretend play
they're not just driving
they're starring in their own outdoor adventure
【Powerful 24V 4WD for All Terrains】Move beyond the limitations of 12V or standard 24V 2WD car that struggle on grass and complex surfaces. Featuring a 24V 4WD system powered by four 100W motors
this ride on toy delivers superior torque and traction
smoothly carrying two children (total weight ≤130 lbs) uphill and over terrain like gravel
grass
or mud. An upgraded stable turning radius and a maximum speed limit of 4.3 mph ensure safe and controlled driving
preventing tipping on uneven ground
【Ends Sibling Fights
True 2-Seater Comfort】Unlike other cramped ride ons the market
this electric car for kids features newly upgraded
roomy 2 seats (20”L x 14”W x 7.1”H) that comfortably fit two children aged 3–8
turning"my turn" fights into cooperative adventures. More than just a play vehicle
it makes a perfect gift for birthdays
Children's Day
or Christmas
encouraging active play over screen time
building coordination
and sparking lasting joy
【Remote Control
Command Safety】Stay in full command with the parent priority remote. Optimized with a 65ft Safety Range for max signal power

it lets you steer from your garden chair or stop instantly without lag. This precision helps your child progress from wobbly turns on grass to confident rides on the driveway. Soft-start tech boosts balance for beginners
while lockable doors and 3-point belts secure every bumpy adventure
it's pure joy for them
true peace of mind for you
【Extended Outdoor Playtime】This kids' electric vehicles equipped with a 24V 7AH large-capacity battery (50% more than standard 5AH models)
providing enough power for children to explore parks and cruise down driveways for 70-130 minutes
depending on load and terrain. It also has an extra-large trunk for toys
snacks and treasure maps
sparing parents from carrying bags and letting kids enjoy longer outdoor fun
